channel.title: HxpCTF on k1n0r4
channel.description: Recent content in HxpCTF on k1n0r4

item.title: Required : hxpCTF 2023
item.description: Description I have written a super safe flag encryptor. I’m sure nobody can figure out what my original flag was: 0xd19ee193b461fd8d1452e7659acb1f47dc3ed445c8eb4ff191b1abfa7969 Points - 182 points Solves - 46 solves CTF Rating - 100 Solution Initial Analysis A total of 300 javascript files are provided with a number of missing files. In most cases, the files contain a variety of constraints that our original flag bytes must navigate to produce the output mentioned in the description.
